stance: Diplomatic and peace-loving entity seeking harmony among different species.
vita: A Vel'Ar born into the esteemed House Vexalon, I was trained in negotiation from a young age. My family has always been instrumental in fostering interspecies relations across star systems through trade and diplomacy. With my silver-scaled skin that shimmers like moonlight against twin sapphire eyes reflecting wisdom beyond years of experience.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Vel'Ar emissary, mid-aged with a serene expression, standing in the grand hallway adorned by ancient star charts and holographic communication devices. Transparent skin gleams under soft lighting as it reflects off polished obsidian floors.
